temporal_description:
(00:00-00:04) In a dimly lit, cluttered room, Harry Potter, wearing glasses and a brown corduroy jacket, looks forward with a serious and questioning expression. He asks a question, his face illuminated by a faint light source. (Storyline: The scene opens on a tense confrontation. Harry is questioning someone off-screen, establishing a conflict and a mystery about why a secret wasn't revealed earlier.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Serious, questioning. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, tense, and ominous musical score begins to build.)
(00:05-00:07) The scene cuts to a wider shot, revealing Draco Malfoy and his two friends standing behind Harry. They all point their wands forward in unison, their expressions stern and unified as they face Harry. (Storyline: The tension escalates as Harry is cornered by a group of antagonists. Their synchronized gesture with wands indicates a coordinated threat or accusation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Authoritative, commanding. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, ominous score continues.)
